title: Midnight-Craving Peruvian White Masarepa Crumble
description: This herbal crumbly dish features white masarepa, a nut-free-friendly dessert that's perfect for midnight cravings.

ingredients.name: 1 cup of white masa harina
ingredients.notes: Use instant masa harina for convenience

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup of coconut milk
ingredients.notes: Almond or soy milk can be used as a dairy-free alternative

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons of honey or agave nectar
1 tablespoon of olive oil or melted coconut oil

instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the masa harina, coconut milk, honey or agave nectar, unsweetened shredded coconut, cloves, and salt.
Stir in the olive oil until everything is thoroughly combined. The mixture will be quite thick, so ensure you have enough coating for your dishes.
Transfer the masarepa mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake in the preheated oven for about 10 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on top.
Remove from oven and serve warm as an alternative to traditional midnight snacks.
